title: .NET Backend Engineer
responsibilities: develop and maintain .NET services; integrate databases and internal systems; improve code quality, observability, and deployment flow
requirements_text: We are looking for a junior specialist with hands-on experience in c#, .net, asp.net core, sql server, entity framework. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: PixelCraft is hiring a junior .net backend engineer to support building enterprise backend systems and internal business applications.
raw_text: Vacancy V069: .NET Backend Engineer at PixelCraft. Location: Kyiv. Employment: contract. Required experience: 1.3 years. Required skills: c#, .net, asp.net core, sql server, entity framework, rest api, redis, blazor. Optional skills: gRPC, kubernetes. Responsibilities: develop and maintain .NET services; integrate databases and internal systems; improve code quality, observability, and deployment flow.
